typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) view external returns (string memory,string memory,address payable,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool,bool)
function (uint256) view external returns (string memory,string memory,address payable,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool,bool)

documentation.text:
@notice Returns true if a project has reached its funding goal (via this contract).
 @param projectId The project to check

@notice Admin-only function to update the project contract address if redeployed.
 @param newAddress New address of the Project contract
@notice Reject plain ETH transfers (no projectId)

devdoc.author: Person B
devdoc.details: Interacts with MicroDons (Project.sol) deployed by Person A.      ReentrancyGuard pattern is implemented manually to avoid OZ dependency.

donate(uint256).details: Checks project is active, records donation, checks funding threshold,      and emits events. Uses nonReentrant for safety.

params.projectId: The ID of the project to donate to

getProjectsDonatedByUser(address,uint256.details: Iterates over provided project ID range – caller supplies bounds      to avoid unbounded loops. Gas-safe for off-chain use.

params.donor: The donor address to look up

returns.projectIds: Array of project IDs the donor contributed to

params.newAddress: New address of the Project contract

withdraw(uint256).details: Uses Checks-Effects-Interactions. Sends all ETH held for this project.

params.projectId: The project whose funds to withdraw

_donors.details: projectId => ordered list of unique donors

_hasDonated.details: projectId => donor => has donated (to avoid duplicate push)

donationsBy.details: projectId => donor address => cumulative amount donated

markedFunded.details: projectId => whether this contract has already marked it funded

totalRaisedPerProject.details: projectId => total ETH raised through this contract

devdoc.title: Donation

DonationReceived(uint256,address,uint256.notice: Emitted when a donation is received

DonorRefunded(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a donor is refunded (project failed)

FundsWithdrawn(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when the project owner withdraws funds

ProjectFunded(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when a project crosses its funding threshold

constructor.notice: Deploy with the address of Person A's already-deployed Project contract.

donate(uint256).notice: Donate ETH to a specific project.

getDonationAmount(uint256,address).notice: Get the amount a specific donor gave to a specific project.

getDonorsForProject(uint256).notice: Returns donor history for a project (address + amount pairs).

getProjectsDonatedByUser(address,uint256.notice: Returns all project IDs that a given donor has contributed to.

isFunded(uint256).notice: Returns true if a project has reached its funding goal (via this contract).

projectContractAddress().notice: Address of Person A's Project contract

updateProjectContract(address).notice: Admin-only function to update the project contract address if redeployed.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw collected funds for a project. Only callable by the project owner.

userdoc.notice: Handles all donation logic: accepting ETH, tracking donors,         threshold checking, status flip to Funded, and secure withdrawal.
